Our Story

More Than Just Candy

PushUp started with a simple dream — to recreate the joy of biting into a fresh tropical fruit, wrapped in the fun of a candy. Our founders grew up in the heart of Kerala, where guavas, jackfruits and coconuts were everyday treats. We wanted the whole world to taste that childhood.

🌱
Natural First
Every ingredient is chosen for purity and real flavor.
🤝
Community
Proudly supporting local farmers and suppliers.
💡
Innovation
Always exploring new flavors and textures.
❤️
Made with Love
Every piece is crafted with care and attention.

“We don’t just blend fruits. We bring natural refreshment that fuels every moment. ”

— PushUp Founders

The PushUp Chronicle

THE STORY
BEHIND THE PUSHUP

From a small idea in Kerala to 30,000+ customers across India — this is how PushUp was born, built, and shared with the world.

Scroll to explore
Real Fruit Energy✦ Born in Kerala✦ No Artificial Flavors✦ 30,000+ Customers✦ 6 Flavors✦ Crafted with Care✦ Real Fruit Energy✦ Born in Kerala✦ No Artificial Flavors✦ 30,000+ Customers✦ 6 Flavors✦ Crafted with Care✦
Scene 01 — The Beginning

HOW IT ALL
STARTED

PushUp began with one simple question: why do energy candies taste so artificial? A small kitchen in Kerala, a founder obsessed with real fruit, and a belief that natural energy deserved a better form.

No investors. No shortcuts. Just real fruit, real effort, and a community that grew by word of mouth — one honest bite at a time.

6+
Flavors
30K
Customers
₹49
Per Pack
Our Journey
2020
The idea sparked — real fruit energy candy, crafted in Kerala
2021
First batch launched — fresh, natural, and loved instantly
2022
All 6 flavors live — 10,000 customers reached organically
2026
30,000+ customers across India — still growing, zero ads
48h
First Sold Out
Scene 02 — Natural Flavors

SIX FLAVORS. PURE ENERGY.

Crafted from real fruits, each PushUp flavor delivers freshness, vibrant taste, and natural energy — no artificial colors, no fake flavors.

Scene 03 — How We Make It

BEHIND THE CANDY

No shortcuts. No factory lines on autopilot. Every pack is made through a process we designed ourselves — because real quality can't be automated.

01
🌿
Farm-Fresh Sourcing
Seasonal fruits sourced directly from South India farms. No concentrates, no artificial extracts — real ripe fruit at peak.
02
⚗️
The Flavour Lab
Every batch taste-tested before it leaves. If it doesn't hit our "yes, that's it" benchmark — it doesn't ship.
03
🤲
Small-Batch Craft
Small batches on purpose. More control, more care, less compromise. When scale kills quality, we slow down.
04
📦
Sealed & Shipped
Packed fresh, sealed tight, shipped fast. Your pack arrives exactly as it left — full of flavour, ready to open.
👨‍🍳

ABHILASH RAJAN

Founder & Chief Flavour Officer
30K+
Customers
Scene 04 — The Founder

THE MIND
BEHIND PUSHUP

"

Every PushUp carries my belief — that energy should come from something real, not something artificial.

— Abhilash Rajan, Founder

Growing up in Kerala, real flavors were part of everyday life — fresh fruits, natural taste, and simple ingredients. PushUp was born from that idea: to bring real fruit energy into a candy, and share that freshness with everyone.

Scene 05 — The Love

WHAT PEOPLE FEEL

We didn't rely on ads or trends — people fell in love with PushUp because it feels real, tastes real, and delivers natural energy.
